title: Compass HUD
description: Compass HUD adds a clean, minimalistic compass to the top of your screen
body:
🧭 About Compass HUD

> Never lose your sense of direction again. Compass HUD adds a clean, minimalistic compass to the top of your screen, showing cardinal directions and precise degrees. Whether you're navigating vast mountain ranges or aligning builds with perfection, this lightweight tool keeps you oriented without cluttering your interface.

✨ Features

- Always-visible compass with N, S, E, W markers

- Displays exact degree heading for precision

- Sleek, unobtrusive design that fits any modpack style

🎯 Perfect for exploration, navigation, building alignment, and immersive gameplay.
